events.title: Portrait Life Drawing Session
events.description:
The live model session will feature one extended 2 1/2 hour pose with a 20-minute break.

Join us for a live clothed model session open to all artists and skill levels. Guests are welcome to bring watercolor, acrylic paint, charcoal or their favorite medium to explore life drawing and painting from observation. A portrait drawing session is a wonderful way to strengthen both artistic skill and personal expression. Through careful observation, artists improve technical abilities while deepening their understanding of anatomy and proportion. Studying light, shadow, and texture helps refine hand-eye coordination while enhancing expression and confidence in drawing. Beyond technique, portrait drawing can be deeply therapeutic, offering a calming, focused practice that reduces stress and encourages self-expression.

Facilitated by Thoa Nguyen, with model Sibyl James. All mediums are welcome. ✏️🎨🖌️

Bring your own art supplies.
We will have tables and chairs and some easels.

Suggested donation: $15

Donate here to secure your spot now!

events.title: Rooted Here: Artists from the SEEDArts Studios
events.description: This Community Exhibit features Iris Antman, Patrick George Appleby, Jacqui Beck, Alexie Hoffman, Sally Kim-Miller, Bekah Marcum, Beth Sims, and Katherine Yasi – all artists who create their work at the SEEDArts Studios in Hillman City.
